elements.text: begins to grow. We can fly kites in the park on windy days. And we can ride bicycles with our friends on sunny days.

elements.id: docling_color_textbook_教材全解1+1二年级下册英语上海牛津版_page_066_2
elements.text: Alice: What about you? What's your favourite season?

elements.id: docling_color_textbook_教材全解1+1二年级下册英语上海牛津版_page_066_3
elements.text: Kitty: My favourite season is winter. And it's also a nice season. It often snows in winter, and we can go skating or make a snowman.

elements.id: docling_color_textbook_教材全解1+1二年级下册英语上海牛津版_page_066_4
elements.text: Alice: Yeah, every season is beautiful. I love four seasons.

elements.id: docling_color_textbook_教材全解1+1二年级下册英语上海牛津版_page_066_6
elements.text: There are four seasons in a year. They are spring, summer, autumn and winter. I like spring. It is warm. It often rains. I can plant trees and flowers in spring. Summer is very hot. I can swim in the river. Autumn is a good season. I can fly kites in autumn. I can eat many apples, too. Winter is cold. It often snows. I wish I can make a snowman in winter. I love all the seasons because they are beautiful.

elements.id: docling_color_textbook_教材全解1+1二年级下册英语上海牛津版_page_066_8
